items.title: SDK: replace thread pool with async/await in analytics.py
items.description: sdk/mutx/analytics.py uses synchronous requests. Replace with httpx async client. Add mutx_api.py.

items.title: Backend: protect all dashboard API routes with auth middleware
items.description: app/routers/ dashboard routes have no auth decorator. Add auth checks to all endpoints.

items.title: Backend: fix auth middleware coverage gaps
items.description: Some backend routes are not protected by auth middleware. Audit all routes, add auth to missing ones.

items.title: Backend: load SSO_USERNAME and SSO_PASSWORD from env vars
items.description: auth.py does not read SSO_USERNAME and SSO_PASSWORD from environment variables. Fix.

items.title: Backend: make CORS configurable, remove hardcoded allow_origins=['*']
items.description: app/main.py has hardcoded allow_origins=['*'] with credentials=True. Make this configurable via env.

items.title: Queue: enforce async governance, not just logging
items.description: Queue governance logs violations but doesn't block. Add enforcement — reject non-compliant submissions.

items.title: Backend: persist session recordings to storage
items.description: Session recording path not implemented. Add storage layer for session recordings.

items.title: SDK: add timeouts and cancellation support to API calls
items.description: requests calls have no timeout= parameter. Add timeouts and cancellation support to all SDK calls.

items.title: Docs: complete SDK reference documentation
items.description: SDK docs missing: deployment, observability, auth, and many endpoint references.

items.title: Docs: write agent session deployment guide
items.description: No agent deployment documentation exists. Write a runbook for deploying agent sessions.

items.title: SDK: implement async mutx_api.py for async/await interface
items.description: mutx_api.py is entirely missing. Create it with httpx AsyncClient providing the full async API surface.
